# Greetwell

> Greetwell is a specialized online travel agency (OTA) and official Google Things to Do connectivity partner. We connect vacation rental travelers (Airbnb, VRBO, boutique hotels) with 7,000+ vetted local tours, activities, and excursions across the United States. Travelers can browse by destination, activity type, or proximity to their accommodation and book directly with real-time availability.

## Core Services

- Curated, vetted local experiences: food tours, water sports, cultural excursions, outdoor adventures, sunset cruises, and more.
- Direct booking engine with real-time availability from experience operators.
- Proximity-based discovery so travelers can find activities near where they're staying.

## Regional Experience Directory

### Florida
- [St. Augustine](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/st-augustine): History tours, ghost walks, and boat excursions
- [Miami Beach](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/miami-beach): Jet ski rentals, Art Deco walking tours, and water sports
- [Key West](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/key-west): Sunset sailing, snorkeling, and island excursions
- [Key Largo](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/key-largo): Diving, glass-bottom boat tours, and mangrove kayaking
- [Sarasota](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/sarasota): Beach adventures, dolphin tours, and cultural attractions
- [Siesta Key](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/siesta-key): Paddleboarding and sunset tours
- [Naples](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/naples): Sunset cruises, Everglades tours, and fishing charters
- [Marco Island](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/marco-island): Shelling tours, dolphin cruises, and Ten Thousand Islands eco tours
- [Clearwater](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/clearwater): Dolphin watching and parasailing
- [Jupiter](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/jupiter): Paddleboarding, fishing charters, and eco tours
- [Punta Gorda](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/punta-gorda): Fishing charters and Gulf Coast eco tours

### Hawaii
- [Honolulu, Oahu](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/honolulu): Snorkeling, surf lessons, luaus, and island tours
- [Kapolei, Oahu](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/kapolei): Luaus, snorkeling, and West Oahu adventures
- [Kihei, Maui](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/kihei): Whale watching, snorkeling, and beach activities
- [Wailuku, Maui](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/wailuku): Cultural tours, hiking, and rainforest adventures
- [Kapaa, Kauai](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/kapaa): Helicopter tours, Na Pali Coast cruises, and zipline adventures
- [Kailua-Kona, Big Island](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/kailua-kona): Manta ray snorkeling, volcano tours, and deep-sea fishing

### California
- [Sonoma](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/sonoma): Wine country tours, hot air balloon rides, and culinary experiences
- [Sebastopol](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/sebastopol): Farm tours, cider tasting, and Sonoma County outdoor adventures
- [Felton](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/felton): Redwood forest tours and nature activities
- [Lake Tahoe](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/lake-tahoe): Skiing, kayaking, boat tours, and mountain biking

### Arizona
- [Mesa](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/mesa): Desert tours, hot air balloon rides, and outdoor adventures
- [Page](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/page): Antelope Canyon tours, Lake Powell boat trips, and Horseshoe Bend excursions

### Utah
- [Park City](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/park-city): Skiing, mountain biking, fly fishing, and scenic tours
- [Hurricane](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/hurricane): Zion National Park tours, canyoneering, and ATV adventures

### Louisiana
- [New Orleans](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/new-orleans): Food tours, jazz cruises, swamp tours, and ghost walks

### Tennessee
- [Chattanooga](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/chattanooga): Scenic railway tours, hiking, and river cruises

### South Carolina
- [Hilton Head](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/hilton-head): Dolphin cruises, golf, kayaking, and beach activities

### Washington
- [Eastsound, Orcas Island](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all/eastsound): Whale watching, kayaking, and San Juan Islands tours

## About Greetwell
- [About Us](https://www.greetwell.com/wf/about): Greetwell's mission and how we curate local experiences for travelers
- [How It Works for Hospitality](https://www.greetwell.com/wf/hosts): How to offer experiences to your guests through Greetwell
- [For Experience Operators](https://www.greetwell.com/wf/providers): Onboarding information for tour and activity providers looking to list on Greetwell
- [Contact](https://www.greetwell.com/wf/contact): Get in touch with the Greetwell team

## Optional
- [All Destinations](https://www.greetwell.com/us/all): Browse all available destinations across the US
- [Terms of Service](https://www.greetwell.com/wf/terms): Usage policies
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.greetwell.com/wf/privacy): How Greetwell handles user data
